introSection: Doo Wopper is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In 2005, the Doo Wopper was relocated from Wild Wheels pier to the original Morey's 25th Street Pier where it replaced the Pinfari RC-48. Screamin' Swing took the former Doo Wopper space on Wild Wheels Pier.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is themed to a hamburger stand.

fullText:
Doo Wopper is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA.

In 2005, the Doo Wopper was relocated from Wild Wheels pier to the original Morey's 25th Street Pier where it replaced the Pinfari RC-48. Screamin' Swing took the former Doo Wopper space on Wild Wheels Pier.

The ride is themed to a hamburger stand.

Red track and blue supports.
